content: Run complete test suite to verify 100% pass rate before sprint planning
Fix oracle_tests::test_oracle_multiple_regression - coefficients and fitted values differ significantly from R
Take stock assessment of current progress toward R superiority goals
Plan next sprint based on assessment and core mission objectives
Enhance LmFit summary to include R², adj-R², F-statistic, residual standard error for full R parity
Fix F-test p-value calculation - currently giving 1-CDF instead of CDF for upper tail test
Execute baseline performance benchmark vs R's lm() using mtcars dataset to validate 2x speedup target
Implement Minimum Viable Formula (MVF) supporting ~, +, * operators for core formula functionality
Add Oracle tests for multicollinearity, zero variance predictors, and other edge cases R handles
